meaning: n.传送器,运输,运输机,激动,流放犯,狂喜vt.传送,运输,流放,放逐
examples: The goods were damaged during transport.
Applicants must have their own transport.
Guy Houston quit as Transport Scotland's finance chief after concern over his shares in First Group.
Public transport is excellent in Prague, with a well-integrated Metro, tram and bus system.
